headline: Truist Increases Bank of America (BAC) Price Target, Cites Better-Than-Expected Trading Growth
summary: Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC) is included among Billionaire Steven Cohen’s Top 11 Dividend Stock Picks. On June 26, Truist raised its price recommendation on Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC) to $64 from $61. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares. The update came as part of a broader research note covering universal and […]

headline: CTA Treasury short covering gathers pace as equity longs face pressure
summary: Investing.com -- Systematic traders are rapidly covering bearish positions in U.S. Treasuries as falling bond yields trigger risk-management thresholds, while maintaining sizeable long equity positions despite recent stock market weakness, according to a new report from Bank of America.

content.title: CTA Treasury short covering gathers pace as equity longs face pressure
